_description: Step 9: Create Workflow Templates (upgrade lifecycle definitions)

data.name: Standard Campus Upgrade
data.description: Full upgrade lifecycle for campus switches: pre-check → distribute → activate → wait → ping → post-check → verify → report

data.name: SD-WAN Edge Upgrade
data.description: SD-WAN aware upgrade flow with extended wait timers for control-plane reconvergence

data.name: Data Center Rolling Upgrade
data.description: Spine/Leaf upgrade template with readiness evaluation and verification gates

data.name: Emergency Hotfix (No Checks)
data.description: Minimal flow: distribute → activate. No pre/post checks. Use for critical CVE patching only.
